name: @chbrain/khai-engine-status
description: khai engine content, the status domain: rank as position in the scene's deference order
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: rank as position in the scene's deference order

card.wire: Link the scene's status order -- who defers to whom -- to the anchor.
card.issue: Which characteristic (diffuse or specific) sets rank in this scene?
card.require: Each persona links a status expression under Projection.
card.enforce: Do not merge status with power or role; a high-status persona may be powerless, and vice versa.
card.setup: Identify one or two relevant status characteristics for the scene before drafting personas.
